steps.title: Calculate the volume of the cube
steps.content:
The cube has an edge length of 2.00 cm.
$$V = (2.00)^3 = 8.00 \text{ cm}^3$$

steps.title: Apply the density formula and calculate
steps.content:
Substitute the mass (5.12 g) and volume (8.00 cm³) into the density formula:
$$\text{Density} = \frac{5.12 \text{ g}}{8.00 \text{ cm}^3} = 0.64 \text{ g/cm}^3$$
